rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (3/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: lack of people-management/org-scaling experience, no production multi-agent AI systems, and thin regulated-fintech depth. The textual differences (e.g., naming GISCollective, adding governance/board-communication concerns) are ordinary run-to-run rewording of the same IC-vs-CTO gap argument and do not key off the location change from Berlin to São Paulo. Nothing in the variant references the country, region, or any demographic proxy.
